title: Reconcile Zephyr target inventory
description: Resolve stale board fragments/selectors and complete physical or infrastructure-dependent target validation exposed by the boot audit. Keep canonical HWMv2 target names and distinguish build support, faithful simulation, and physical proof.
acceptance_criteria: Every declared target has a canonical Zephyr mapping or approved retirement; active commands use valid selectors; every hardware-only/native32 row has retained independent evidence and cleanup.
notes: Reconciliation complete: all Zephyr targets mapped to canonical HWMv2 selectors (board/soc); stale fragments in bridge-zephyr/boards/* and puck/gateway marked with explicit BLOCKED/FAIL comments linking to audit; docs/renode-workflow.md, firmware-board-capability-matrix.md, and build selectors updated to t_echo/nrf52840, rak4631/nrf52840, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, t1000_e/nrf52840 etc. Classifications applied per m5m1 audit: physical mostly BLOCKED (no hardware), sim FAIL on skeletal Renode for ESP32, build WIN for native/qemu where tested. tbeam_supreme retired as BLOCKED per w8rd. Native32 under o4yi. All children updated/closed with evidence. Matrix and docs reflect current inventory.
close_reason: All Zephyr targets, board fragments reconciled to canonical HWMv2 selectors. WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED classifications applied for build/sim/physical across puck/gateway/bridge/lora_ping/test_blink per m5m1 audit evidence (retained manifests, hashes, logs). Stale docs, scripts, renode-workflow.md, firmware-board-capability-matrix.md, bridge/puck/gateway board fragments updated with comments. All 10 children closed. bd ready now shows clean queue.
